name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: New! My first newsletter.
body:
| | [ ](http://tr.email.donjr.com/c/eJw9zTsOwyAQRdHVmBLNwGBDQREnYh_EQEyEP8JI3n6cFJFecat3gvVeCjIsWwECQYIBQEmSIx_dqO7SKXz0AOB0RxAXnwsP2_qufNoWNtuEWislSMVnwpQM9eDFpFOcgtESiS1WaEAaEFmxc2v70clbJ9y1_8_VrNqwn7mUfPTDJb1-0tdodo3nUWJrseIHWkEzPQ)
---
| **Welcome to the first edition of my weekly newsletter!** When the Big Tech overlords began purging conservatives like my father from social media, I became determined to find a way to go around them in case they ever came for me, and with that said, I'm proud to deliver you the inaugural DonJr.com newsletter directly to your inbox today. Going forward, this will be a weekly newsletter where I will bring you exclusive OpEds, video commentary, important announcements about the future of our America First movement and maybe even a few other surprises. We're going to have some fun here and I appreciate each and every one of you for checking out our first edition. Together, we will face down Big Tech and the fake news media to Make America Great Again. Enjoy! -Donald Trump Jr.
---
| **Don Jr. Rant of the Week: CPAC 2021**
---
| [ ](http://tr.email.donjr.com/c/eJwdjtsOgyAQRL9GHskuIOgDD7WN_8HNSoOXCNbfLzWZZGayyc7x2hjORE-iZsAQOPQAyAWnSIdxaJ98bPElAWDsGgFhMTFRv62fg7ptIbNuZe_sZAGEn6xrJSjvVScNKmud6pEsmnWAQiGSpOdS9tzwR8PGqimmkOl6uhTOvJt3LfVpPdwD1e-5XEMOq8fq3-jDRueyJHJov18xpZilqmTvm-zPVPQarpxCKeHAH-9XRQY)
---
| **Don Jr. Oped of the Week**
---
Rush taught conservatives how to fight leftwing censorship, we must carry on his legacy By Donald Trump Jr. The passing of our friend, Rush Limbaugh, creates a void that cannot be filled. He was not only a conservative icon, he was an American icon. He was someone who truly gave a voice to millions of people across the country. As a movement, we are now faced with the difficult challenge of ensuring that his amazing legacy is continued and built upon. What many may not remember - or be old enough to know - is that Rush Limbaugh pioneered a resurgence of conservative media in the late 1980's. Prior to Rush, conservative radio was dark for nearly two decades. In the late 1950's and early 1960's, conservatism was flourishing on talk radio. It was both informing and engaging a whole new wave of right-leaning activists. However, this rise did not go unnoticed. President John F. Kennedy and his advisors actually feared it. They had just won a tight election and this growing medium was helping to organize and engage conservative, anti-Communist activism. In doing so, it was also hypercritical of President Kennedy's liberal trade policies. President Kennedy flexed the power of the executive branch to weaponize what was known as the Federal Communications Commission's Fairness Doctrine. This rule said if broadcasters aired any political viewpoint, then they must provide equal airtime to the opposite view. In reality though, as conservative radio surged, the left failed to compete. So, at the direction of President Kennedy, the FCC ratcheted up its enforcement on "fairness." Dark money groups funded legal challenges of conservative broadcasters who didn't provide free airtime for liberal rebuttals. Since Democrats were unable to compete on radio, they used government to successfully silence their political opposition. It worked for more than a decade. It was not until the late '80s and early '90s when enough reforms were made at the FCC that broadcasters had the freedom to allow for conservative talk radio to be reborn. Rush Limbaugh became that pioneer and a lightning rod for conservative activists. In the time since, Democrat like Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer and Speaker Nancy Pelosi have tried to revive the FCC rules that drove conservatives off the airways. They've specifically pointed to the influence of Rush on America's political discourse. Luckily, they have not been successful, although that hasn't stopped Congressional Democrats just this week from calling for Fox, Newsmax and OANN to be banned from cable. Sadly, we are now at a place where censorship and discrimination against conservative viewpoints isn't just coming from an out of control big government. Instead, we are seeing an avalanche of woke corporations based out of Silicon Valley engaging in rampant censorship of conservative views in a transparent effort to crush any dissent from their leftwing orthodoxy. The leftists who run many of these big tech companies have built "open" platforms. But they do not actually want free speech, they just want leftist-approved speech. They have invested billions into monitoring, censoring, and eliminating the ideas and people who they do not like. People like my father, myself, and yes, even YOU. This is the whole reason I started this newsletter. We cannot be beholden to any one platform and we cannot afford to lose this fight. We must continue to fight and work to ensure that free people, in a free nation, can speak freely without being silenced by either big government or big tech. This is, at its core, the fight Rush Limbaugh championed - and it is the fight I intend to continue.
| Support these great conservative organizations and help them keep fighting for our America First movement!

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch and Allied Educational Foundation File Supreme Court Brief Objecting to California Targeting of Donor Privacy
body:
Judicial Watch announced it joined with Allied Educational Foundation (AEF) to file an amici curiae (friends of the court) brief in the U.S. Supreme Court that supports overturning a California law that compels the disclosure of tax-exempt organizations’ donors.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 8, 2021
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctZG9ub3ItcHJpdmFjeS1jYWxpZm9ybmlhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMDkwMDMyMzY=) | **[Judicial Watch and Allied Educational Foundation File Supreme Court Brief Objecting to California Targeting of Donor Privacy](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctZG9ub3ItcHJpdmFjeS1jYWxpZm9ybmlhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMDkwMDMyMzY=)** Judicial Watch announced it joined with Allied Educational Foundation (AEF) to file an amici curiae (friends of the court) brief in the U.S. Supreme Court that supports overturning a California law that compels the disclosure of tax-exempt organizations’ donors. The brief argues that mandatory disclosure of donors leads to intimidation, harassment and threats or reprisals from government officials and private parties that could chill the exercise of First Amendment rights. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22290&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctZG9ub3ItcHJpdmFjeS1jYWxpZm9ybmlhLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMDkwMDMyMzY=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22323&F=H&) | **[Mexican Cartels Overcome Pandemic Hurdles to Remain Greatest Criminal Drug Threat to U.S.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22323&F=H&)** Mexican cartels adjusted to restrictions imposed by the global pandemic last year to smuggle huge amounts of narcotics into the U.S. and remain the greatest criminal drug threat to the country, expanding the market as methamphetamine deaths skyrocket. The government classifies them as Transnational Criminal Organizations (TCO) and in 2020 they flooded the nation with illicit drugs though a staggering 28,000 pounds of methamphetamine and millions of counterfeit pills containing fentanyl were seized by law enforcement agents. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22323&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22277&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZW1haWxzLXdoby10ZXJtcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzA5MDAzMjM2) | **[Judicial Watch: New Emails Detail WHO/NIH Accommodations to Chinese Confidentiality ‘Terms’](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22277&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZW1haWxzLXdoby10ZXJtcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzA5MDAzMjM2)** Judicial Watch announced that it and the Daily Caller News Foundation (DCNF) received 301 pages of emails and other records of Dr. Anthony Fauci and Dr. H. Clifford Lane from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services showing that National Institutes of Health (NIH) officials tailored confidentiality forms to China’s terms and that the World Health Organization (WHO) conducted an unreleased, “strictly confidential” COVID-19 epidemiological analysis in January 2020. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22277&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvZW1haWxzLXdoby10ZXJtcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj10aXBzaGVldCZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwMzA5MDAzMjM2)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22287&F=H&) | **[Nearly 2 Million Airport Workers May Pose Security Threat as U.S. Studies Cost of Screening Them](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22287&F=H&)** Nearly 2 million workers with unescorted access to security restricted areas at airports throughout the U.S. could pose an “insider threat,” according to a new federal audit, yet the government is still studying how to effectively curb the risk. Congress has tasked the famously inefficient Transportation Security Administration (TSA), created after the 9/11 terrorist attacks to protect the nation’s transportation system, with submitting a plan examining the cost and feasibility of enhanced worker screening measures at American airports, but it seems that the agency cannot handle the task. The assignment was embedded in a 2018 law, TSA Modernization Act, that aims to improve the agency’s screening technologies, streamline its passenger screening process and mandate more rigorous background checks of airport workers, among other things. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22287&F=H&)

### [‘Equity’ Drives Virginia Vaccine Distribution ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22288&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZXF1aXR5LWRyaXZlcy12YS12YWNjaW5lLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMDkwMDMyMzY=) Newsmax Like several other states, Virginia is vaccinating its population in phases, with healthcare personnel and residents of long-term care facilities receiving utmost priority. With that population completed, according to the Virginia Department of Health, the second group includes a peculiar combination of frontline workers, people 65 and over, those with medical conditions, incarcerated criminals and those living in homeless shelters or “migrant labor camps.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22288&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZXF1aXR5LWRyaXZlcy12YS12YWNjaW5lLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMDkwMDMyMzY=)

### [Judicial Watch to Facebook: End Censorship of Trump ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22289&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvYnJlaXRiYXJ0LXRydW1wLWZhY2Vib29rLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMDkwMDMyMzY=) Breitbart We asked Facebook’s Oversight Board to end the censorship of former President Trump and allow him back onto the platform. We told its “Oversight Board” that the decision to suspend Trump is an affront to free speech and transparency. The Oversight Board is empowered by Facebook to review and overturn Facebook’s censorship decisions. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53100&L=22289&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvYnJlaXRiYXJ0LXRydW1wLWZhY2Vib29rLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAzMDkwMDMyMzY=)

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced it joined with Allied Educational Foundation (AEF) to file an amici curiae (friends of the court) brief in the U.S. Supreme Court that supports overturning a California law that compels the disclosure of tax-exempt organizations’ donors. | | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 8, 2021 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced it joined with Allied Educational Foundation (AEF) to file an amici curiae (friends of the court) brief in the U.S. Supreme Court that supports overturning a California law that compels the disclosure of tax-exempt organizations’ donors. The brief argues that mandatory disclosure of donors leads to intimidation, harassment and threats or reprisals from government officials and private parties that could chill the exercise of First Amendment rights. = ---|--- | | | | == | == Mexican cartels adjusted to restrictions imposed by the global pandemic last year to smuggle huge amounts of narcotics into the U.S. and remain the greatest criminal drug threat to the country, expanding the market as methamphetamine deaths skyrocket. The government classifies them as Transnational Criminal Organizations (TCO) and in 2020 they flooded the nation with illicit drugs though a staggering 28,000 pounds of methamphetamine and millions of counterfeit pills containing fentanyl were seized by law enforcement agents. == ---|--- | | | | | Judicial Watch announced that it and the Daily Caller News Foundation (DCNF) received 301 pages of emails and other records of Dr. Anthony Fauci and Dr. H. Clifford Lane from the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services showing that National Institutes of Health (NIH) officials tailored confidentiality forms to China’s terms and that the World Health Organization (WHO) conducted an unreleased, “strictly confidential” COVID-19 epidemiological analysis in January 2020. ---|--- | | | | = | = Nearly 2 million workers with unescorted access to security restricted areas at airports throughout the U.S. could pose an “insider threat,” according to a new federal audit, yet the government is still studying how to effectively curb the risk. Congress has tasked the famously inefficient Transportation Security Administration (TSA), created after the 9/11 terrorist attacks to protect the nation’s transportation system, with submitting a plan examining the cost and feasibility of enhanced worker screening measures at American airports, but it seems that the agency cannot handle the task. The assignment was embedded in a 2018 law, TSA Modernization Act, that aims to improve the agency’s screening technologies, streamline its passenger screening process and mandate more rigorous background checks of airport workers, among other things. = ---|--- | | | == Breitbart Judicial Watch is your watchdog in Washington – Hillary Clinton knows who we are, and President Trump knows who we are. I’m not sure what Joe Biden knows, but millions of patriots across the nation know and support our heavy lifting to expose and stop government corruption. == = Newsmax Like several other states, Virginia is vaccinating its population in phases, with healthcare personnel and residents of long-term care facilities receiving utmost priority. With that population completed, according to the Virginia Department of Health, the second group includes a peculiar combination of frontline workers, people 65 and over, those with medical conditions, incarcerated criminals and those living in homeless shelters or “migrant labor camps.” = = Breitbart We asked Facebook’s Oversight Board to end the censorship of former President Trump and allow him back onto the platform. We told its “Oversight Board” that the decision to suspend Trump is an affront to free speech and transparency. The Oversight Board is empowered by Facebook to review and overturn Facebook’s censorship decisions. = = = = = = = | CLIPS = = | == | | = | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- == == == = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved == |

We are in the middle of a global pandemic. Tens of millions of Americans are uninsured or underinsured. Prescription drug prices are sky-high. And Republicans are playing politics with Joe Biden’s nominee to serve as the Secretary of Health and Human Services in his administration.
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26017165/275638487/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxZjZiZGI1LWY5ODAtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4-z6EZ7rURLv_ncTQZEGERIaopY5_oYqiT6mWTohqDo=)

Friends -
Xavier Becerra needs our help.
We are in the middle of a global pandemic. Tens of millions of Americans are uninsured or underinsured. Prescription drug prices are sky-high. And Republicans are playing politics with Joe Biden’s nominee to serve as the Secretary of Health and Human Services in his administration.
It has been almost two months since Joe Biden was sworn in. We need an HHS Secretary now. The Senate MUST confirm Xavier Becerra immediately.
Add your name if you agree:
**[Sign our petition: tell the Senate to confirm Xavier Becerra, Joe Biden’s pick for the Secretary of Health and Human Services.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26017166/275638491/-395107573?ms=210309-becerra&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxZjZiZGI1LWY5ODAtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4-z6EZ7rURLv_ncTQZEGERIaopY5_oYqiT6mWTohqDo=&emci=914c0f4f-f880-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=81f6bdb5-f980-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=7684583)**
This is politics for Republicans. The ultra-conservative Heritage Foundation is running a half a million dollar ad campaign in the swing state of Arizona focusing on Xavier Becerra’s record on guns and immigration of all things.
Now it is no surprise that the Republican Party, the party that told us COVID would just disappear, doesn’t feel the urgency we do about our country’s need to have a Health Secretary. But this delay puts lives at risk.
Xavier has the experience needed for this role. He has spent a lifetime of service fighting for quality and affordable health care. He was a distinguished member of Congress. He is a leader.
And he can help lead us through this COVID-19 crisis.
**[Sign our petition: tell the Senate to confirm Xavier Becerra, Joe Biden’s pick for the Secretary of Health and Human Services.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/26017168/275638493/-395107573?ms=210309-becerra&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxZjZiZGI1LWY5ODAtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwMTU1ZDQzYzk5MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=4-z6EZ7rURLv_ncTQZEGERIaopY5_oYqiT6mWTohqDo=&emci=914c0f4f-f880-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&emdi=81f6bdb5-f980-eb11-85aa-00155d43c992&ceid=7684583)**
Thanks for making your voice heard. Our voices matter on this confirmation.
All my best,
Chuck Rocha
Nuestro PAC

clean_body: We are in the middle of a global pandemic. Tens of millions of Americans are uninsured or underinsured. Prescription drug prices are sky-high. And Republicans are playing politics with Joe Biden’s nominee to serve as the Secretary of Health and Human Services in his administration. = Friends - Xavier Becerra needs our help. We are in the middle of a global pandemic. Tens of millions of Americans are uninsured or underinsured. Prescription drug prices are sky-high. And Republicans are playing politics with Joe Biden’s nominee to serve as the Secretary of Health and Human Services in his administration. It has been almost two months since Joe Biden was sworn in. We need an HHS Secretary now. The Senate MUST confirm Xavier Becerra immediately. Add your name if you agree: This is politics for Republicans. The ultra-conservative Heritage Foundation is running a half a million dollar ad campaign in the swing state of Arizona focusing on Xavier Becerra’s record on guns and immigration of all things. Now it is no surprise that the Republican Party, the party that told us COVID would just disappear, doesn’t feel the urgency we do about our country’s need to have a Health Secretary. But this delay puts lives at risk. Xavier has the experience needed for this role. He has spent a lifetime of service fighting for quality and affordable health care. He was a distinguished member of Congress. He is a leader. And he can help lead us through this COVID-19 crisis. Thanks for making your voice heard. Our voices matter on this confirmation. All my best, Chuck Rocha Nuestro PAC ****** Paid for by Nuestro PAC Nuestro PAC P.O. Box 1368 Chattanooga, TN 37402 United States . name: Senate Republicans
subject: SENATE FLIPS TO REPUBLICAN CONTROL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | |
If we start getting to work NOW for the 2022 Elections, this could be the headline November 9, 2022:
|
**" SENATE FLIPS TO REPUBLICAN CONTROL"** November 9, 2022

---

You've seen what the Democrats have been doing to take our country back to the Obama era, and we can't afford another TWO years of this! We can stop the Biden-Harris administration, but only if we WIN. **Are you with us, Friend?**

| | [TAKE BACK THE SENATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FtrfO7gbBzhqBmqxHBm8hAKGbXUcMplP9AJLFSERGaspuRB8G5dLp47SZ0nOSBmCAEXsD5AhtgqNHhFKDSEArgWMrvK3DXP0dOnD9mrC1QbIV2N526ZiGJR3xRd3bbQzO1CfZVPqHnhRaEUWeZTgmYkHqDF_DEnBGMnBYjXlID7T6_5N3zfLvxRavKAbSlJjWrIBJRCJSY5bb6KdYaOagiuO8mnvyaKlCLlKe25iWoTPnt4pCiIKVo82quA_T5KcDKLDrElqKpKXQgiG1Yu31qifRp7TX8Zowma9f0D8OoflaVk7-Y2l6d8bGxwroty2Av3iu8TksmmxOsHMnB1X0y_bKvHg_eITU2HuHAwqg_GKHl5genVN-w6LmbBuKp45X_rDE1SEGefvyqjjmOky_6RJDI3in5J67SdOKatB7dxnyI25fk2mbA==&c=i0UyQuktAcl7-kkBTqP5T4i8qFSUiDtA4U1SbBR8UGy67M522ycFXA==&ch=6qaoIlKficrS98NOs6a0JB1FyLUey2fE8w7lseQImSXMEZykOjfkBw== "TAKE BACK THE SENATE")
---

The Senate is currently tied at **50 Democrats to 50 Republicans ... And Kamala Harris is the tie-breaking vote.** What this means is that the stakes have truly NEVER been higher. We can't afford to lose a single seat, or we're toast. **[BUT, with your help today, you can make sure that doesn't happen: Donate to help us take back the Senate and put a stop to Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi having TOTAL power!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FtrfO7gbBzhqBmqxHBm8hAKGbXUcMplP9AJLFSERGaspuRB8G5dLp47SZ0nOSBmCAEXsD5AhtgqNHhFKDSEArgWMrvK3DXP0dOnD9mrC1QbIV2N526ZiGJR3xRd3bbQzO1CfZVPqHnhRaEUWeZTgmYkHqDF_DEnBGMnBYjXlID7T6_5N3zfLvxRavKAbSlJjWrIBJRCJSY5bb6KdYaOagiuO8mnvyaKlCLlKe25iWoTPnt4pCiIKVo82quA_T5KcDKLDrElqKpKXQgiG1Yu31qifRp7TX8Zowma9f0D8OoflaVk7-Y2l6d8bGxwroty2Av3iu8TksmmxOsHMnB1X0y_bKvHg_eITU2HuHAwqg_GKHl5genVN-w6LmbBuKp45X_rDE1SEGefvyqjjmOky_6RJDI3in5J67SdOKatB7dxnyI25fk2mbA==&c=i0UyQuktAcl7-kkBTqP5T4i8qFSUiDtA4U1SbBR8UGy67M522ycFXA==&ch=6qaoIlKficrS98NOs6a0JB1FyLUey2fE8w7lseQImSXMEZykOjfkBw== "BUT, with your help today, you can make sure that doesn’t happen: Donate to help us take back the Senate and put a stop to Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, Chuck Schumer, and Nancy Pelosi having TOTAL power!")**

The Democrats have spent the last 2 months focused on an impeachment motivated by political vengeance, killing American jobs, and allowing China to skate by. Can you imagine what they'll do with another 2 years? **We need to start TODAY to take back the Senate and stop the Democrats:**

---
| | [TAKE BACK THE SENATE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FtrfO7gbBzhqBmqxHBm8hAKGbXUcMplP9AJLFSERGaspuRB8G5dLp47SZ0nOSBmCAEXsD5AhtgqNHhFKDSEArgWMrvK3DXP0dOnD9mrC1QbIV2N526ZiGJR3xRd3bbQzO1CfZVPqHnhRaEUWeZTgmYkHqDF_DEnBGMnBYjXlID7T6_5N3zfLvxRavKAbSlJjWrIBJRCJSY5bb6KdYaOagiuO8mnvyaKlCLlKe25iWoTPnt4pCiIKVo82quA_T5KcDKLDrElqKpKXQgiG1Yu31qifRp7TX8Zowma9f0D8OoflaVk7-Y2l6d8bGxwroty2Av3iu8TksmmxOsHMnB1X0y_bKvHg_eITU2HuHAwqg_GKHl5genVN-w6LmbBuKp45X_rDE1SEGefvyqjjmOky_6RJDI3in5J67SdOKatB7dxnyI25fk2mbA==&c=i0UyQuktAcl7-kkBTqP5T4i8qFSUiDtA4U1SbBR8UGy67M522ycFXA==&ch=6qaoIlKficrS98NOs6a0JB1FyLUey2fE8w7lseQImSXMEZykOjfkBw== "TAKE BACK THE SENATE")
---

We know it's early, but the Democrats are well on their way to holding onto their total control. We need to start today if we want to win.

Thank you,
Senate Republicans

Friend,
**Our March Priorities Survey is LIVE and Young Kim wants to hear from you.**
As one of our most informed and engaged supporters, Young looks to you to help guide her agenda in Congress. After all, she promised to be your voice. Now that she's elected, this is one of the ways she's following through with that promise.
A couple of action items Young is already prioritizing are lowering taxes, improving our immigration system, getting small businesses the pandemic relief they need, creating jobs, and strengthening our economy just to name a few.
Do you agree with these priorities? Let her know! Have others to add? She'd like to know that too.
**Your input is vital not only to CA-39, but to the entire country. We wouldn 't reach out if it wasn't. **
_Please note: This survey closes at midnight tonight. Respond with your feedback as soon as possible._
Young Kim looks forward to reading your response.
Thanks,
Team Young

---
Paid for by Young Kim for Congress

Now that she's elected, this is one of the ways she's following through with that promise. A couple of action items Young is already prioritizing are lowering taxes, improving our immigration system, getting small businesses the pandemic relief they need, creating jobs, and strengthening our economy just to name a few. Do you agree with these priorities? Let her know! Have others to add? She'd like to know that too. Your input is vital not only to CA-39, but to the entire country. We wouldn 't reach out if it wasn't. Please note: This survey closes at midnight tonight. Respond with your feedback as soon as possible. Young Kim looks forward to reading your response. Thanks, Team Young Paid for by Young Kim for Congress PO Box 2186 Fullerton CA, 92837 == | | Young Kim for Congress | PO Box 2186, Fullerton, CA 92837 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:

Did you see Senator Young's announcement last week that he is running for reelection? Todd fights every day to advance our conservative America First agenda, and now he needs you to fight along with him.

**Todd has played a critical role in tax reform, allowing Hoosiers to keep more of their paychecks, voting to confirm constitutionalist judges, and getting a fellow Hoosier confirmed to the highest court in the land, Justice Amy Coney Barrett. **

clean_body: We wanted to make sure you were in the loop. ** . == Friend, We wanted to make sure you were in the loop. Yesterday, Michelle announced an incredible opportunity to really make a difference. Right now all donations made to her page are being matched 5X. This means we can really make an impact against the Democrats' dark money machine. Here's just how much you can make a difference: == | == == == The only way we are going to return common sense leadership to the House, restore a conservative agenda in Washington, and to create a better future for all Americans, is to win back the House for Republicans. We have a long way to go, but we can only make it happen if we start now. We can make it happen with your support.** == \-- Team Steel HQ With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Senator Joni Ernst
subject: I’m joining Gov. Kim Reynolds’ fight to keep Iowa open!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Kim Reynolds for Iowa Committee
body:
Join me in fighting alongside Gov. Kim Reynolds today.

Friend, I need to be frank: the policies that Chuck Schumer, Nancy Pelosi, and AOC are proposing are just insane. They are directly threatening our way of life in Iowa. While the Radical Left wants endless lockdowns and to keep our kids out of the classroom, leaders like Governor Reynolds are fighting to get America back up and running.
Now that Democrats control the White House, Congress, _AND_ the Senate, it's up to conservative Governors like Kim Reynolds to push back and show our nation the way forward.
Governor Kim Reynolds is fighting to keep Iowa open and has led the nation in getting our kids back into the classroom safely. _I know firsthand that conservative governors like her are the last line of defense against the Biden, Schumer, and Pelosi agenda and that 's why I'm supporting Kim Reynolds. _

name: Sen. Mark Warner
subject: Become a citizen co-sponsor of the Paycheck Fairness Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Sign on today
|
---

| | Derek,

Women deserve equal pay for equal work. That's why, throughout my time in the Senate, I've repeatedly introduced the _Paycheck Fairness Act_ to finally close the gender pay gap. While those past efforts were blocked by Congressional Republicans, we now have an opportunity with the Democratic majority to make this long overdue change.

**If you agree that it's time to guarantee equal pay to all women, will you sign on today to become a citizen co-sponsor of the Paycheck Fairness Act?** | [I support the Paycheck Fairness Act](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8a7/53d9897e/56dca651/1c88de5b/759778631/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-paycheckfairnesspetition")
---
There has never been a more important time to make sure this bill becomes law. In the face of the COVID-19 pandemic, women have been hit disproportionately hard by job losses. This has only deepened the disparities facing women of color in the workplace. Passing the _Paycheck Fairness Act_ will help ensure that as we rebuild our economy, we do so in a way that is equitable and just.

We need to show that this legislation has the support of the American people. With your help, we can pass the Paycheck Fairness Act through both chambers of Congress and send it to President Biden's desk for a signature.

**First, though, I need _your_ signature. _[Add your name today to show your support for ending the gender pay gap.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8a7/53d9897e/56dca651/1c88de5b/759778631/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-paycheckfairnesspetition")_**

Thanks,
Mark

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8a7/53d9897e/56dca651/1c88de5a/759778631/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db21?refcode=20210309_p_1_fl__973__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d8a7/53d9897e/56dca651/1c88de59/759778631/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

body:
We need a President who is tough with America's enemies and who won't target children's entertainment.

body:
\- it’s Nancy. When I ran for congress I promised to get to Washington and GET THINGS DONE. And in the few short months I’ve been on Capitol Hill [](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=b942e085cd3a475c9645b9c9c59fa966&_e=J6QCcC_D-dHFdbdyZqBO_QgRf6xq8wH5Uv8e_znniK53F_gTY-sEiSS2SjtyPN3AIty8uCTC77gB2F8uqQBq1znMPpH28I5BtGZiF1e5PRIwQupWJKdBfCo1reK86ljdbHfZq-5rrl2EcGOo62MzAdGFktQKj7l3miDypkBlHVt_fc7-eteDXFvIIXXx8AwV6vHnZqaSfxolgIVqWZ6fLv0TbCLfKRv8b-Gcwa0qx2rpQAizL4fNEg4RoEOvDmEZdpf1RzDGFF_A9xJZupkVrSGvb4Q6LfRjbrU_2hXXJkLCp4Bd61bwR1dBpNcOzWo4xw3mXjaBldc_6FH4ElBS_PjCURtojacLa3tBzQr4_3-K7nTxQun-DH05TYopONn16bdAZBDbWoyMncA4-oZBYh-Ue3YJahiGvWULIXH_wKUSsccP1IbPiJAT1tlTJ_Xun-UqMgsAVeNiyZymMyj1qvlde_OY_qSTHECZcB4_bdo%3D) Friend \- it’s Nancy. When I ran for congress I promised to get to Washington and GET THINGS DONE. And in the few short months I’ve been on Capitol Hill, that’s exactly what I’m doing. We are all juggling a lot right now, but I’m determined to get real results for South Carolina. Here are 3 things on the top of my list:
1. _Opening our schools_
2. _Getting relief to FAMILIES and small businesses affected by COVID -- not ramming through partisan liberal wishlists _
3. _Eliminating the red tape that has been keeping Americans down_

**I know there’s a lot that Congress needs to tackle — and I’m determined to get Washington on track, roll up my sleeves, and get down to business.** But Friend, I need your support to take on Nancy Pelosi and the Washington status quo that stands in the way of the tremendous progress we could be making. Can I count on you to chip in today to support my efforts? [**YES: CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=b942e085cd3a475c9645b9c9c59fa966&_e=J6QCcC_D-dHFdbdyZqBO_QgRf6xq8wH5Uv8e_znniK53F_gTY-sEiSS2SjtyPN3AIty8uCTC77gB2F8uqQBq1znMPpH28I5BtGZiF1e5PRIwQupWJKdBfCo1reK86ljdbHfZq-5rrl2EcGOo62MzAdGFktQKj7l3miDypkBlHVt_fc7-eteDXFvIIXXx8AwV6vHnZqaSfxolgIVqWZ6fLv0TbCLfKRv8b-Gcwa0qx2rpQAizL4fNEg4RoEOvDmEZdpf1RzDGFF_A9xJZupkVraJ4qynSCHt7Ci0WhMDcNOSQV7i5g7eOVoxiOP9lOA2iHuvRyBrHVw9MbX8Mc5KoaauWz8s0f_tymzvMhrdh51u0Nceb6qqxw-phRSiTIUGSIIZzAJ71h8FLmaNAmXXwJm81PbzRZ4efU88hZDh75ta-LdqGXf04c5wNT3IEnk02sC8W9na0KiuchhNkkBEu8WGfnTPan6AkoWllpl_DKns%3D) I can’t wait to get results on the issues that matter most to our families, workers, and small businesses. As a single mom and a businesswoman myself, I understand the struggles we’re facing today and I know we’ve all had enough of the business as usual politics in Washington. clean_body: \- it’s Nancy. When I ran for congress I promised to get to Washington and GET THINGS DONE. And in the few short months I’ve been on Capitol Hill Friend \- it’s Nancy. When I ran for congress I promised to get to Washington and GET THINGS DONE. And in the few short months I’ve been on Capitol Hill, that’s exactly what I’m doing. We are all juggling a lot right now, but I’m determined to get real results for South Carolina. Here are 3 things on the top of my list: 1. Opening our schools 2. Getting relief to FAMILIES and small businesses affected by COVID -- not ramming through partisan liberal wishlists 3. Eliminating the red tape that has been keeping Americans down I know there’s a lot that Congress needs to tackle — and I’m determined to get Washington on track, roll up my sleeves, and get down to business. But Friend, I need your support to take on Nancy Pelosi and the Washington status quo that stands in the way of the tremendous progress we could be making. Can I count on you to chip in today to support my efforts? I can’t wait to get results on the issues that matter most to our families, workers, and small businesses. As a single mom and a businesswoman myself, I understand the struggles we’re facing today and I know we’ve all had enough of the business as usual politics in Washington. If you’re ready for a Washington that works FOR YOU, I hope you’ll join me today by supporting my campaign: By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution: If you've saved payment information with Revv or WinRed, your donation will go through automatically. Thank you, Nancy Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

body:
You may have seen it — The New York Times is after me again! The crack team of journalists at the New York Times searched far and wide [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=89336bfb1c7146b3835822383185eeee&_e=gb29mf6CgDTDxcLlBI8UOfoe7EXGKUyjNsQh3hiSl45PSov66z_f2vBzB6RsdLuyBhYGGtZcnQ0JlRtRFiT3aARBxs1RbNfF6J7LvR06TPKsNSkWVvxJi7jTTkxUS0RwrE5CIXzyN1rkRRt5qlfiwZJDuK69x1L1SmjNyFz0rWj87hRptE9WFa6Ch-u2TAK9YDG0td4RpOw6Dw5WywoWq4dC_yrcz_-13q6TBEo77_5l2qJfhE6PmvB8piiZ3nhC8M78KUcX06LFhWC_EVhFW3by1448acW1KijxCQESE4UiD72uEY-mSWYudjEhbQp7T5C9aVqtKn_iCJ1zCG_Z_rFaJaGfNUEYFYlv1shMQ4Q%3D) | |

Peter,
You may have seen it — _**The New York Times is after me again!**_

The crack team of journalists at the New York Times searched far and wide for individuals to attack my conservative principles on the record and somehow settled on an old prom date and **MY MIDDLE SCHOOL PRINCIPAL.** I’m not kidding.

By now, I’m used to being attacked by the mainstream media, but this is a new low, even for the New York Times. They’ll stop at nothing until I am canceled, silenced, or out of the fight.

But I’m not intimidated, **I’m _EMBOLDENED._**

I am even more committed to dismissing mainstream-media lies, fighting the toxic policies coming out of the Biden administration, and reigning in the dangerous big-tech oligarchs who manipulate our lives from Silicon Valley.

_**I can't do it alone.**_

Help me in my fight against dangerous democrat policies by donating. _Every dollar helps._
[_**DONATE HERE**_](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=89336bfb1c7146b3835822383185eeee&_e=gb29mf6CgDTDxcLlBI8UOWs3NUKWD2j-5O7_F9zEVtOuJjJnZ2OtzziEY0b6c2LRiZChWv3oqUyl5FZwaNt5EfN_g0ppU1tppv_7ywDCUPyl9K8a--6RnFC1xiltDW5-RZwzwSM6K5Oc0p-9qajOHgCNssLTOo4xLUbAOXE5XFjBeIc1SdV2tCNLz4cvl6AAxr52Agf3mHPWASfmTx_ih8oEtns-WCMLi2LhoLqzFAsESGR5PekMsnKEWlPhUCYAmeZbkkvRLoVhzM6h3VxgCPpNy6pmJAs25asNSl7Aoa_uPYvTIR-BCfJBzmDudQlDc0MBtMbq4IdX_BZ_Kp3-3OvOfsCnuVsFpcgDCS_LLAxBBwq_Lxl_V3UajhfTWwFZCXwhjE5tZo6YoYHP8rS9dVCfh_kM1QzsCidTEO1PpBc%3D)

Thank you,
Josh Hawley

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Information about COVID-19 vaccinations in PA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
I wanted you to have all the information in one place.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/vW8jMV-GxwSV/ZXgwVnQ1bitnVFo4WWIyWHZXYktPYS9DQkJ5aUJtK0xNQmNEcjJEK285TlA3RDV6Z052RUR1NS9aT1l4VUVtaFBVOHk2R0d2TlZiY0pzcEVGWkdIQ3Bsb2Nqazl5ZFcrOHJBYzFwd3ovM3M9S0/) Friend, There's more and more good news every day in the fight against COVID-19, and I wanted to reach out with some information you should know: We're making critical progress every single day keeping our communities safe, but I know every state is different. NPR has a new tool to learn about eligibility in your state, where you can get vaccinated, and more important information all in one helpful tool. **[Check it out and see when and where you can expect a vaccine in your state.](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/EqrVCG0N4xFp/ZXgwVnQ1bitnVFo4WWIyWHZXYktPYS9DQkJ5aUJtK0xNQmNEcjJEK285TlA3RDV6Z052RUR1NS9aT1l4VUVtaFBVOHk2R0d2TlZiY0pzcEVGWkdIQ3Bsb2Nqazl5ZFcrOHJBYzFwd3ovM3M9S0/)** I want you to feel confident that when your turn comes up to be vaccinated you can rest assured the vaccine will be safe. Both Trudi and I got vaccinated with the Moderna COVID-19 vaccine, and we both remain committed to sharing our experience and the truth about vaccines. We know the vaccine is safe, comfortable, and effective -- and getting it not only helps yourself but your family and everyone in your community. I hope this information is helpful as you make a plan for yourself and your loved ones. It can be hard to know the rules and what to do across the country and from state to state, but **[I hope you'll use NPR's new vaccine tool to see when you can expect a vaccine in your area and how to make an appointment when you can.](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/EqrVCG0N4xFp/ZXgwVnQ1bitnVFo4WWIyWHZXYktPYS9DQkJ5aUJtK0xNQmNEcjJEK285TlA3RDV6Z052RUR1NS9aT1l4VUVtaFBVOHk2R0d2TlZiY0pzcEVGWkdIQ3Bsb2Nqazl5ZFcrOHJBYzFwd3ovM3M9S0/)** Very truly yours, Jay | [LEARN MORE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/mPwjhRjrbkQe/ZXgwVnQ1bitnVFo4WWIyWHZXYktPYS9DQkJ5aUJtK0xNQmNEcjJEK285TlA3RDV6Z052RUR1NS9aT1l4VUVtaFBVOHk2R0d2TlZiY0pzcEVGWkdIQ3Bsb2Nqazl5ZFcrOHJBYzFwd3ovM3M9S0/)

name: Roger Misso
subject: Supporting women and electing them to Congress beyond International Women's Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

You and I both read the glowing tributes promising to support women yesterday on International Women's Day. [Taking the Hill even posted one.](https://act.myngp.com/el/RI19GYGblMSh7Xi1skhbww74XPcXLUyiWuV5yA6TiBw=/8rZOK8HQVbylhk6Jwu7_mHPf30mFUUSCP1LWITjxlxU=?s=20) But here, we believe that the real measure of an organization's commitment to inclusion and gender parity is how they act on all the other days of the year.

Taking the Hill was the only veterans organization in the country to have a majority-woman slate of endorsed candidates in 2020. We don't just preach about supporting women in politics - we back it up with real action and financial resources. We are incredibly proud to support women like Senator Tammy Duckworth, Secretary-nominee Deb Haaland, and Rep. Elissa Slotkin.

But I think you'll agree that there simply aren't enough women in Congress. _**That 's why we need you to support our efforts today.**_ [_**We have an anonymous donor who wants to help us elect women veterans in 5 states, but will only match your contribution (up to 200%) for the next 24 hours. Can you get us a contribution today to help us take advantage of this opportunity?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/RI19GYGblMSh7Xi1skhbww74XPcXLUyiWuV5yA6TiBw=/4RdhFCwBDctIkDNWvFYwyMQykMt5yUzVJmGRPcVEGZY=)

Thank you for helping us elect more women - especially women veterans and military family members - to Congress.

In solidarity,
Roger

_Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/RI19GYGblMSh7Xi1skhbww74XPcXLUyiWuV5yA6TiBw=/HSTMRSanowmph-aX-VCW2eCuvOuMbCpItiZCePOMQtg=)_
[_@RogerMissoCNY_](https://act.myngp.com/el/RI19GYGblMSh7Xi1skhbww74XPcXLUyiWuV5yA6TiBw=/m-dAilTEJCSA33QbW-_uNocZQMvdt4XXPNfTfWWJyyk=)

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Take action to protect voting rights in Georgia's legislature
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa34c/34a064cc/1de1e11e/7025cfc/2672542845/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Yesterday, with your help, voting rights advocates defeated over 45 anti-voting bills in Georgia's legislature. This means that YOUR calls, emails, and action made a difference. Thank you for all you have already done to help protect voting rights. To be clear -- the continued pressure from volunteers across the state has made these crucial wins possible. While we had many small victories, we still saw blatant attacks on our democracy. The GOP-led Senate passed SB 241, despite the strenuous objections from Democrats, a handful of Republicans, and voters. To make matters worse, Republican Senators Albers, Hufstetler, Kirkpatrick, Miller, and Strickland refused to vote rather than join together to prevent it from passing -- and rather than doing everything in his power to defeat this extreme anti-voting bill, Lieutenant Governor Geoff Duncan refused to even be in the chamber during the debate. After passing 241, the Senate passed four more anti-voting bills before the end of the day. Now, with Crossover Day behind us, it's time to redouble our efforts against voter suppression bills like HB 531 and SB 241. HB 531 would limit early and weekend voting, criminalize providing food and water to voters waiting in line, limit drop boxes, and more. Some of SB 241 most dangerous provisions would end no-excuse vote by mail, add onerous new ID requirements, increase the risk of voter intimidation, and allow legislative takeover of county boards of elections. **We know your voices make a difference, so here 's what you can do right now to fight back against these anti-voting bills: ** **Call and email these Georgia legislators and demand they OPPOSE SB 241:**
* Speaker David Ralston: 404-656-5020, david.ralston@house.ga.gov
* Barry Fleming: 404-656-5125, barry.fleming@house.ga.gov
* Alan Powell: 404-463-3793, alan.powell@house.ga.gov
* Jan Jones: 404-656-5072, jan.jones@house.ga.gov
* Chuck Martin: 404-656-5146, chuck.martin@house.ga.gov
* Lynn Smith: 404-656-7149, lynn.smith@house.ga.gov
* Bonnie Rich: 404-656-5087, bonnie.rich@house.ga.gov
* Houston Gaines: 404-656-0298, houston.gaines@house.ga.gov
* Rick Williams: 404-656-0254, rick.williams@house.ga.gov
* Shaw Blackmon: 404-463-7853, shaw.blackmon@house.ga.gov
* Buddy Deloach: 404-656-0178, buddy.deloach@house.ga.gov

**Call and email these Senators to demand they OPPOSE HB 531:**
* Max Burns: (404) 656-7586, max.burns@senate.ga.gov
* Dean Burke: (404) 656-0040, dean.burke@senate.ga.gov
* Jason Anavitarte: (404) 656-0085, jason.anavitarte@senate.ga.gov
* Mike Dugan: (404) 656-7872, mike.dugan@senate.ga.gov
* Steve Gooch: (404) 656-9221, steve.gooch@senate.ga.gov
* Bo Hatchett: (404) 656-7454, bo.hatchett@senate.ga.gov
* Butch Miller: (404) 656-6578, butch.miller@senate.ga.gov
* Randy Robertson: (404) 463-3931, randy.robertson@senate.ga.gov
* Brian Strickland: (404) 463-6598, brian.strickland@senate.ga.gov

Together, we will continue to stand up for Georgians' voting rights and work to defeat any attempts to pass anti-voting legislation. Thank you for all you do -- the work continues! Let's get it done. \- Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa34c/34a064cc/1de1e11e/7025cfd/2672542845/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa34c/34a064cc/1de1e11e/7025cfa/2672542845/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa34c/34a064cc/1de1e11e/7025cfb/2672542845/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001T5IADtEubziF-WiOaWuui6wNBOXc-pmvf8iDz1tyYZ8v2qFoVVgC6qxC09xeAMDiaQU5s1Bvo5oyuBU8QWtfi4OmDAzFCWEFuX2NRrPbBpFLUwJCnJhJ5BNuyVYNfxHzZYjtQEqETPU=&c=MblnrVqW18XYICkH54cHS8LwEBgx1h7YjORb5RQgZXy_q8hffcVCkg==&ch=JCEAZ2Rv2Iek1oVjx2AK1VlL0TNYs08l612ov2yPhCA71AMk1E6QYA==).

we're launching a massive fundraising effort to rush critical EARLY support to battleground states that Democrats have put at the top of their list.

Friend, With the Senate TIED 50-50, Chuck Schumer is in charge and Kamala Harris holds the tie breaking vote.

Democrats have already used their narrow Majority in the Senate to make SERIOUS advances on the far-left agenda! **T******he** good news: ****we can FLIP the Senate by gaining just ONE SEAT!

The bad news: we will have to fight an uphill battle to catch up to the Democrats' MAJOR fundraising advantage.** The latest reports show that there are a handful of states that will come down to the wire. If we're going to gain at least one seat, _we have to be ready in ALL of them._ That's why we're launching a massive fundraising effort to rush critical EARLY support to battleground states that Democrats have put at the top of their list.
